name: refreshable-scroll-view
description: ScrollView wrapper with a themed RefreshControl for pull-to-refresh.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the scroll view.

props.name: refreshing
props.description: Whether the refresh indicator is currently showing.

props.name: onRefresh
props.description: Callback fired when the user pulls down to refresh.

props.name: contentContainerStyle
props.description: Style applied to the scroll view's content container.

props.name: contentPadding
props.description: Uniform padding applied to all sides of the content container using a spacing token.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the outermost ScrollView.
